name: open-interpreter
notes: Executes LLM-generated shell/python code locally. Prime LLM010 + LLM020 target.

name: aider
notes: AI pair-programming. Edits files based on LLM output.

name: gpt-engineer
notes: Generates full projects from prompts; writes files from LLM output.

name: autogen
notes: Microsoft multi-agent. Code-execution agent uses LLM output as code.

name: embedchain
notes: RAG / memory framework. Documents flow into LLM prompts.

name: vanna
notes: Open-source text-to-SQL. Directly mirrors the paper's Figure 1 motivating example.

name: openai-cookbook
notes: Official OpenAI examples. Mix of safe/unsafe demonstrative patterns.

name: anthropic-cookbook
notes: Official Anthropic examples. Uses messages API.

name: langchain-templates
notes: LangChain monorepo; we will scope analysis to libs/langchain/langchain/agents and templates.
